zh.lifeSummary: 當John A Tresenriter Jr於1816年11月10日出生時，他的父親John Tresenriter36歲，母親Rhoda A Hancock29歲。他於1837年4月6日與Catharine Ann Woolf在美國印第安納州哈里森結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1850年住在美國印第安納州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普。他去世於1897年1月30日享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John A Tresenriter Jr于1816年11月10日出生时，他的父亲John Tresenriter36岁，母亲Rhoda A Hancock29岁。他于1837年4月6日与Catharine Ann Woolf在美国印第安纳州哈里森结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1850年住在美国印第安纳州弗洛伊德格奧智托 堂史普。他去世于1897年1月30日享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.
Historical Information 1833:  Floyd, Indiana, United States

historicEvents.title: Indiana Nears Bankruptcy
historicEvents.description: The State of Indiana was near bankruptcy in 1841 due to the inability to repay interest incurred for the Massive Internal Improvement Act. The state liquidated much of its public works. Many of the projects were handed over to the state’s creditors as a way to reduce debt. Only two of the eight proposed infrastructure projects were completed by the creditors.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Battle at Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The Battle of Gettysburg involved the largest number of casualties of the entire Civil war and is often described as the war's turning point. Between 46,000 and 51,000 soldiers lost their lives during the three-day Battle. To honor the fallen soldiers, President Abraham Lincoln read his historic Gettysburg Address and helped those listening by redefining the purpose of the war.

historicEvents.title: The Assassination of James Garfield
historicEvents.description: Garfield was shot twice by Charles J. Guitea at Railroad Station in Washington, D.C. on July 2, 1881. After eleven weeks of intensive and other care Garfield died in Elberon, New Jersey, the second of four presidents to be assassinated, following Abraham Lincoln.

historicEvents.title: The Chinese Exclusion Act
historicEvents.description: A federal law prohibiting all immigration of Chinese laborers. The Act was the first law to prevent all members of a national group from immigrating to the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When John A Tresenriter Jr was born on 10 November 1816, his father, John Tresenriter, was 36 and his mother, Rhoda A Hancock, was 29. He married Catharine Ann Woolf on 6 April 1837, in Harrison, Indiana, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, United States in 1850. He died on 30 January 1897, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John A Tresenriter Jr est né le 10 novembre 1816, son père, John Tresenriter, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rhoda A Hancock, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Catharine Ann Woolf le 6 avril 1837, à Harrison, Indiana, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, États-Unis en 1850. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1897, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John A Tresenriter Jr am 10. November 1816 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Tresenriter 36 und seine Mutter Rhoda A Hancock 29. Er hat am 6. April 1837 in Harrison, Indiana, Vereinigte Staaten Catharine Ann Woolf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1850 hat er in Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 30. Januar 1897 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John A Tresenriter Jr è nato il il 10 novembre 1816, il suo padre, John Tresenriter, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Rhoda A Hancock, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Catharine Ann Woolf il 6 aprile 1837, nel Harrison, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì il 30 gennaio 1897, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John A Tresenriter Jrが1816年11月10日に生まれた時，父John Tresenriterは36歳，母Rhoda A Hancockは29歳であった。1837年4月6日にアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州ハーリソンでCatharine Ann Woolfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州フロイドジョージェトウン トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1897年1月30日に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John A Tresenriter Jr(이)가 1816년 11월 10일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Tresenriter(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Rhoda A Hancock(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1837년 4월 6일 미국 인디애나 주 해리슨에서 Catharine Ann Woolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 인디애나 주 플로이드 조짓운 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1897년 1월 30일 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John A Tresenriter Jr nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1816, seu pai, John Tresenriter, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rhoda A Hancock, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Catharine Ann Woolf em 6 de abril de 1837, em Harrison, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1897, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John A Tresenriter Jr родился 10 ноября 1816 г., его отцу по имени John Tresenriter было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rhoda A Hancock, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Catharine Ann Woolf 6 апреля 1837 г. в местности харрисон, Индиана, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности джеоргетоун тоуншип, флоид, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Он умер 30 января 1897 г. в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John A Tresenriter Jr nació el 10 de noviembre de 1816, su papá, John Tresenriter, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Rhoda A Hancock, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Catharine Ann Woolf el 6 de abril de 1837, en Harrison, Indiana, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Georgetown Township, Floyd, Indiana, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió el 30 de enero de 1897, a la edad de 80 años.
